calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-29-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar this day for small claims appeal, the parties appeared through their counsel. Exhibits marked and introduced. Witnesses sworn and examined.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-26-2005 Dismissal

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-26-2005 Continued To Jan-26-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 001
MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on appeal of small claims judgment for Plaintiff/Respondent Richard L. Rodriguez.
Appearances: John Joseph Murphy, Esq. for Plaintiff/Respondent, who is also personally present. No appearance for Appellant/Defendant.
At 9:50 am, appellant having not appeared and the matter having been set for hearing at 9:00 am, the Court dismissed the appeal and confirmed the judgment of July 20, 2004 in San Francisco Small Claims action number 808532.
Judge: Wallace P. Douglass; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-29-2004 Continued
